Title: Paulsson, Gergor
Overview: Influential scholar at the University of Uppsala. His students included Rudolf Zeitler (habilitation).
Selected Bibliography: The Creative Element in Art. Oslo ["Kristiania"]: Arthur Nelson, 1923; Svensk stad. 2 vols. Stockholm: Bonnier, 1950.
Sources: Kultermann, Udo. The History of Art History. New York: Abaris, 1993, pp. 191.
